principle: Components are the product grammar. Screens compose approved components instead of inventing one-off UI.

AppShell.purpose: Provide stable mobile-first page frame and navigation context.
rules: Do not duplicate page frame styling in feature components.

PrioritySection.purpose: Group health actions by attention level.
rules: Dashboard order must be today -> soon -> later.
Must contain HealthPlanItem or approved empty state only.

HealthPlanItem.purpose: Represent one preventive health action with status and next action.
rules: Must use StatusPill for status display.
Must expose a user action when status is due or overdue.

StatusPill.purpose: Display a semantic status label consistently.
rules: Visible label must be localized/user-facing, never a raw enum.
Explain the score in plain language.
Do not make clinical risk claims.

ReminderSelector.purpose: Let the user set a simple reminder.
rules: Confirmation copy must be calm and specific.
Custom dates must validate before save.

FamilyProfileCard.purpose: Show one profile in family mode with attention summary.
rules: Must not mix health actions between profiles.

VaccinationStatusRow.purpose: Show one vaccination status and optional add/update action.
rules: Missing date must use safe fallback copy, not raw null/undefined.
